headline: BOE Unveils Doomsday Scenario for Private Markets Stress Test
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Bank of England will stress test private markets against a doomsday scenario featuring 7% interest rates, a 35% collapse in UK share prices, a 400 basis-point increase in leveraged loan spreads and a wide range of artificial intelligence disruptions, the central bank announced on Friday.Most Read from BloombergRead the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and IranModi Warns of ‘Shortage of Trust’ Ahead of Trump MeetingTrump Blows Through His Iran Red Lines in Justifying Pe

content.title: BOE Unveils Doomsday Scenario for Private Markets Stress Test
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Bank of England will stress test private markets against a doomsday scenario featuring 7% interest rates, a 35% collapse in UK share prices, a 400 basis-point increase in leveraged loan spreads and a wide range of artificial intelligence disruptions, the central bank announced on Friday.Most Read from BloombergRead the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and IranModi Warns of ‘Shortage of Trust’ Ahead of Trump MeetingTrump Blows Through His Iran Red Lines in Justifying Pe

headline: How SablePointe’s Launch And New Leadership At Blackstone (BX) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In June 2026, Ventas executive Carey S. Roberts resigned and later joined Blackstone Inc. as Senior Managing Director and General Counsel – Real Estate, while Blackstone’s credit arm launched SablePointe Credit Strategies to expand its asset-based lending operations under the leadership of James Garlick. Together with Blackstone’s role in a Medallia recapitalization and fresh political scrutiny of data center investments, these moves highlight how the firm is broadening its reach across real...
